body.title: Detailed single-run logging audit (DEFERRED — gated)
body.result: audit_logging.py callsite-level audit shipped (lab/claudecode/audit_logging.py + tests/test_audit_logging.py + lab/claudecode/reports/logging_audit_20260429-211639.md). 456 files, 2522 callsites scanned. 23 classes missing inheritance, 159 print smells, 150 logging.getLogger bypasses, 114 legacy _log sites. 32 new tests pass; 4075 regression tests pass. 5 follow-up migration tickets filed: T-logging-archive-decision, T-logging-class-inheritance-fixups, T-logging-migrate-utility-closet, T-logging-migrate-cognition (gated on UC), T-logging-migrate-lab-claudecode (gated on UC). Commit 2e5ab599.
body.description:
Deferred audit: detailed single-run logging review for a representative Igor run. Walks every log line emitted during the run, classifies by source (which class produced it), checks inheritance from base class, flags noisy/quiet sites, identifies log-line gaps where silent failures could hide.

Gated until the audit pyramid restructure ships (other tickets in D-audit-pyramid-redesign-2026-04-29). Re-evaluate when the foundation is in place.

**Affected files:** TBD when ticket is unblocked.
**Design rules:** TBD.
**Test plan:** TBD when ticket is unblocked.
